title: Overhead View of Colorful Plant-Based Meal Prep in Glass Containers
description: Vertical overhead shot of a colorful plant-based meal prep featuring six glass containers filled with fresh vegetables, grains, legumes, and herbs arranged on a white marble kitchen counter. The meal prep includes ingredients such as edamame, red bell peppers, parsley, purple cabbage, carrot ribbons, green peas, black beans, corn, tomatoes, spinach, cucumber slices, roasted sweet potatoes, broccoli, red onion, and hummus garnished with olive oil and herbs. The scene is illuminated by bright natural light, with wooden utensils, fresh herbs, and a clean background enhancing the healthy and vibrant aesthetic.
